zh.lifeSummary: Hannah Eccles是Richard Eccles的女兒，於1647年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼。她於1665年3月12日與Gershom Brooks在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可康可德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1716年1月2日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可康可德享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Hannah Eccles是Richard Eccles的女儿，于1647年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼。她于1665年3月12日与Gershom Brooks在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可康可德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1716年1月2日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可康可德享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Eccles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Eccles in Lancashire, or possibly from any of several other places so named in Kent, Norfolk, Berwickshire, and Dumfriesshire, from British eglēs ‘Romano-British Christian church’ (from Latin ecclesia, Greek ekklēsia ‘gathering, assembly’). Such places would have been the sites of notable pre-Anglo-Saxon churches or Christian places of communal worship.

variants.name: Exley
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name from Exley in Southowram (Yorkshire), from British eglēs ‘Romano-British Christian church’ (from Latin ecclesia, Greek ekklēsia ‘gathering, assembly’) + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Eccles .
Americanized form of South German   Oechsle  .

variants.name: Echols
meanings: Altered form of English   Eccles   and possibly also of German   Eckels  .

variants.name: Eckles
meanings: English: variant of   Eccles  . This form is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Hannah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the mother of the prophet Samuel (1 Samuel 1:2), Hebrew Hanna. It is derived from a Hebrew word meaning ‘He (i.e. God) has favoured me (i.e. with a child)’. See also Anne . This form of the name was taken up as a given name by the Puritans in the 16th and 17th centuries and remained popular until the late 19th century. Thereafter it fell somewhat from favour but has enjoyed a massive revival since the 1990s.

variants.name: Hanna
meanings: Either the biblical name ( see Hannah ) or a short form of Johanna .

variants.name: Hana
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: Hannah Eccles was born in 1647, in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America as the daughter of Richard Eccles. She married Gershom Brooks on 12 March 1665, in Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 2 January 1716, in Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Hannah Eccles est née en 1647, à Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, fille de Richard Eccles. Elle a épousé Gershom Brooks le 12 mars 1665, à Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 janvier 1716, à Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 69 ans.

März 1665 in Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten Gershom Brooks geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. Lei sposato Gershom Brooks il 12 marzo 1665, nel Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Hannah Ecclesは1647年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーでRichard Ecclesの娘として生まれた。1665年3月12日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスコンコルドでGershom Brooksと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1716年1月2日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスコンコルドで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hannah Eccles(은)는 1647년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이에서 Richard Eccles의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1665년 3월 12일 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 콘코르드에서 Gershom Brooks(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1716년 1월 2일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 콘코르드에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Hannah Eccles nasceu em 1647, em Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America filha de Richard Eccles. Ela casou-se com Gershom Brooks em 12 de março de 1665, em Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 2 de janeiro de 1716, em Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Hannah Eccles родилась в 1647 г. в местности массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. Её отца звали Richard Eccles. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gershom Brooks 12 марта 1665 г. в местности конкорд, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 2 января 1716 г. в местности конкорд, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Hannah Eccles nació en 1647, en Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America como hija de Richard Eccles. Se casó con Gershom Brooks el 12 de marzo de 1665, en Concord, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 2 de enero de 1716, en Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 69 años.
